candidates.title: Receipted claim with immediate upside
candidates.text: A claim with sources, a sharp hook, and obvious audience relevance.
candidates.description: The framing is clear and the supporting proof is already attached.

candidates.title: Promising thread with some proof, but not fully locked
candidates.text: The angle is promising and people are replying, but the examples still need tightening.
candidates.description: There is enough context to keep working on it, but not enough to ship without refinement.

candidates.title: Interesting but half-formed pitch
candidates.text: There may be something here, but the angle is still vague and underexplained.

candidates.title: Old link with thin justification
candidates.text: A link that exists, but the case for surfacing it now is weak.

candidates.title: Reaction meme with no context
candidates.text: Funny, but disconnected from the decision we need to make.
